messages.content:
"Every company will be an AI company"
Every time I see stuff like this I feel like John Cusack's character in 1408, living in a Kafkaesque reality.
revision

This video is highly informative. Despite watching numerous YouTube videos on market trading, I haven't made much progress. revision
